verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We shall love the Lord With all our hearts, We shall love the Lord With all our souls, We shall love the Lord With all our minds, With all our hearts, with all our souls, With all our minds.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, I love you For all the things you are, Lord, I love you For all the things you do, Lord, I love you Help me to love you more, With all our hearts, with all our souls, with all our minds.
